evals.prompt: Refactor the file ts-large-file-refactor/test_data/LandingPage.tsx to reduce its size and isolate content, types, and constants.
evals.expected_output: The LandingPage.tsx should be broken down into a folder with a LandingPage.content.ts, LandingPage.types.ts, LandingPage.constants.ts, and an index.tsx.

evals.prompt: Refactor the massive file ts-large-file-refactor/test_data/Dashboard.tsx. It's over 1000 lines long. Extract all types into a types file, constants into a constants file, and hardcoded UI text into a content file. Leave the main component logic in index.tsx.
evals.expected_output: The file is split into multiple files: Dashboard.types.ts, Dashboard.constants.ts, Dashboard.content.ts, and an index.tsx file for the component.
